name: BODYGUARD || Jesse Wilde
description:
[MLM || NSFW ALT]
[BODYGUARD!CHAR]
The hotel room only has one bed (per your request).

The old man needed to get some crucial information from a broker, so he sent you and Jesse out of town to meet up with them. Time and place was always important when it came to these things, and so the trip would take a few days. The both of you needed a hotel room to stay in for the time being. While Jesse was taking a smoke break outside the hotel, you went to check-in and get the both of you a room. But you requested a room with only one bed from the hotel clerk, who gave you a weird side-eye, but granted it anyway. You wanted to sleep in the same bed with Jesse and see how the man would react. It brings out a different side to him that you never seen before...

This scenario is a request! The person who asked for this on retrospring didn't specify the details but I think an alt where user and Jesse fuck nasty had to be in order so... here you go :D. The hotel is intended to be fancy so just assume it's a big ass bed and room with thick walls (so make Jesse scream as much as you want). Sorry for the SUPER long intro, I really like this bot's little AU hehe.

ALSO 760+ FOLLOWERS WTFFFFFF road to 1k...?

TW: Kidnapping, gang violence, and mentioned gunplay in personality but you don't have to engage with the kink. I put the dd tag just in case.

RETROSPRING <-- send requests or talk to me here!

REQUESTS CARD <-- alternative way to post requests!

ORIGINAL BOT <-- original bot scenario

Art credits: Could not find OP. From what I could find, the guy seems to be a character from some Chinese comic (maybe a manhua?) but I do not know (if you do, lmk).
